title: ruellia hirsutoglandulosa
intro: Ruellia hirsutoglandulosa, also known as hairy glandular ruellia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ruellia hirsutoglandulosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
